历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 8937 → 8398 → 9378 → 9203 → 8392, showing a fluctuating trend over the past 5 years. The baseline for 2025 is about 8392, an increase of about 811 places compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for science/physics category in Gansu was 34 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 35 students in 2024–2025, and remains at 35 students for 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is approximately 101st, with recent rankings fluctuating between 90 and 104, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. There was a negative public opinion incident regarding teacher ethics in 2023, but it is now relatively distant. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 84th (average), with moderate short video exposure, showing no clear signs of popularity surge or application panic. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Anhui University did not enter the A- or above level, with advantageous disciplines mainly at the B level, indicating moderate overall disciplinary strength among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The physics category majors offered by the university in Gansu are mainly popular engineering fields such as Computer Science, Electronic Information Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, and Communication Engineering. Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are all highly recommended majors, strongly attracting candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Gaokao is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from about 179,817 in 2025 (physics category + history category). Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 67.5%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 147,600, an increase of about 26,000, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026 compared to 2025, the significant increase in the number of candidates in Gansu, and the sustained appeal of popular engineering majors, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings slightly declining. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8442, with a range of 7942–8942.
